<!-- Generated by agents-reverse-engineer v1.2.17 -->

# handlers

Specialized pipeline node handlers extending base `NodeHandler` trait. Implements LLM CLI invocation (`CodergenHandler`), shell execution (`ToolHandler`), parallel fan-out/fan-in (`ParallelHandler`, `FanInHandler`), human interaction (`WaitHumanHandler`), and sub-pipeline supervision (`ManagerLoopHandler`). Handler selection keyed by `handler_type()` return strings and node shapes from DOT graphs.

## Contents

### Handler Implementations

- [codergen_handler.rs](./codergen_handler.rs) - `CodergenHandler` spawns Claude/Codex/Gemini CLIs with 600s default timeout, provider-specific JSON/JSONL parsers (`parse_claude_output`, `parse_codex_output`, `parse_gemini_output`), conditional routing via label extraction from last 5 lines
- [manager.rs](./manager.rs) - `ManagerLoopHandler` processes "house" shaped nodes (`handler_type()` returns `"stack.manager_loop"`), supervises sub-pipeline sections with context key `{node.id}.managed`
- [parallel.rs](./parallel.rs) - `ParallelHandler` (`handler_type()` returns `"parallel"`) fan-out from `shape="component"` nodes to outgoing edges; `FanInHandler` (`handler_type()` returns `"parallel.fan_in"`) merge point for `shape="tripleoctagon"` nodes
- [tool_handler.rs](./tool_handler.rs) - `ToolHandler` (`handler_type()` returns `"tool"`) executes shell commands via `tokio::process::Command` with 300s default timeout, captures exit code/stdout/stderr to context keys `{node.id}.exit_code`, `{node.id}.stdout`, `{node.id}.stderr`
- [wait_human.rs](./wait_human.rs) - `WaitHumanHandler` (`handler_type()` returns `"wait.human"`) pauses execution for human input, derives interactive choices from `graph.outgoing_edges(&node.id)` labels via `Interviewer` trait dependency injection

### Module Structure

- [mod.rs](./mod.rs) - Aggregates all handler modules, re-exports `CodergenHandler`, `ManagerLoopHandler`, `FanInHandler`, `ParallelHandler`, `ToolHandler`. Test helpers `make_node()`, `make_minimal_graph()` behind `#[cfg(test)]` flag using DOT format `digraph G { A -> B }`

## Behavioral Contracts

### Handler Selection Keys

- `"codergen"` - LLM CLI tasks
- `"stack.manager_loop"` - Sub-pipeline supervision
- `"parallel"` - Fan-out distribution
- `"parallel.fan_in"` - Synchronization barrier
- `"tool"` - Shell command execution
- `"wait.human"` - Interactive human checkpoint

### Shape-Based Routing (from DOT graphs)

- `"component"` - `ParallelHandler` activation
- `"tripleoctagon"` - `FanInHandler` activation
- `"house"` - `ManagerLoopHandler` activation
- `"diamond"` OR `node_type="conditional"` - Conditional routing mode in `CodergenHandler`

### Timeout Defaults

- `600s` - `codergen_handler` (`Duration::from_secs(600)`)
- `300s` - `tool_handler` (`Duration::from_secs(300)`)

### Validation Constraints

- `MAX_PROMPT_LEN: usize = 10 * 1024` - Prompt byte limit in `validate_prompt()`
- Regex `^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$` - Tool name validation in `validate_allowed_tools()` (alphanumeric, underscore, hyphen allowed)

### Conditional Routing (codergen)

- Label instruction template: `You MUST end your response with exactly one of these labels on its own line: {}`
- Extraction algorithm: `lines().rev().take(5)` for exact case-insensitive match (`eq_ignore_ascii_case`), fallback to full response substring uppercase scan
- Context key: `{node_id}.label` stores selected route

### CLI Security Flags

- Claude Code: `--dangerously-skip-permissions` (bypasses ALL permission prompts), `--no-session-persistence`, `--strict-mcp-config`, `--disable-slash-commands`
- Codex CLI: `--yolo` (auto-approves all actions), `--skip-git-repo-check`, `--ephemeral`
- Gemini CLI: `--approval-mode yolo` (auto-approves all actions)

### Process Termination

- Signal: `libc::SIGKILL`
- Target: `-(pid as i32)` negative PID signals entire process group (Unix)
- Trigger: `tokio::time::timeout` expiry on CLI execution

### Context Update Keys

- `{node.id}.completed` - Boolean success flag
- `{node.id}.result` - Normalized CLI output text
- `{node.id}.dry_run` - Boolean skip flag
- `{node.id}.provider` - LLM provider identifier
- `{node.id}.label` - Selected routing label
- `{node.id}.exit_code` - Shell exit status
- `{node.id}.stdout` - Command standard output
- `{node.id}.stderr` - Command standard error
- `last_tool_command` - Most recent tool invocation
- `{}.managed` - Manager loop completion flag

### Output Truncation

- Tool notes: 4096 bytes via `char_indices()` UTF-8 boundary check, suffix `...(truncated)`
- Error display: 500 bytes for stdout/stderr snippets

### JSON Parsing Patterns

- Claude: Deserializes `ClaudeOutput` fields `result`, `is_error`, `subtype`, `total_cost_usd`, `num_turns`; `is_error` true if `subtype == "error"`
- Codex: Streams JSONL via `serde_json::Deserializer::from_str(stdout).into_iter::<CodexEvent>()`; matches `ItemCompleted`, `TurnFailed`, `Error` variants; skips malformed lines with `tracing::debug!(node = node_id, error = %e, "Skipping malformed Codex JSONL event")`
- Gemini: Deserializes `GeminiOutput` fields `session_id`, `response`, `error`

## File Relationships

- All handlers implement `crate::handler::NodeHandler` trait (defined in `../handler.rs`)
- All handlers use `crate::graph::{PipelineGraph, PipelineNode}` (defined in `../graph.rs`) for graph traversal and node configuration
- `codergen_handler.rs` and `wait_human.rs` access `graph.outgoing_edges(&node.id)` for routing decisions
- `wait_human.rs` depends on `crate::interviewer::{Interviewer, Question, Answer}` (defined in `../interviewer.rs`) for human interaction abstraction
- `mod.rs` re-exports handlers to parent `crate` namespace for registration in engine
- Test utilities in `mod.rs` depend on `attractor_dot::parse` from sibling crate

## Stack

- **Async runtime**: `tokio` with `tokio::process::Command`, `tokio::time::timeout`
- **Traits**: `async_trait::async_trait` for `NodeHandler` implementations
- **Serialization**: `serde`, `serde_json` with derive macros `Deserialize`, `Serialize`
- **System calls**: `libc::kill` for Unix process group termination
- **Error types**: `attractor_types::{Result, AttractorError}` with variants `CliNotFound`, `CommandTimeout`, `HandlerError`
- **Logging**: `tracing` with span fields `node`, `label`, `provider`, `pid`, `timeout_secs`
